title: Intake and Triage Automation
businessProblem: A service business spent too much time sorting inbound requests manually, delaying responses and losing qualified opportunities.
deliveredSolution: Built a lightweight intake workflow that auto-categorized requests, routed priorities, and generated a clear next-action queue for the team.
observedOutcome: Response time dropped from days to same-day for priority inquiries, with less admin load and more consistent follow-through.
